content.json:
# EASM リスクダッシュボード

**Microsoft Defender EASM** のリスク情報を可視化するダッシュボードです。優先度（High/Medium/Low Severity）別にリスクを監視し、アセットへの影響を把握します。

parameters.name: LabelFilter
parameters.label: ラベルフィルタ
parameters.query:
EasmLabel_CL
| summarize by Name_s
| project Label = Name_s
| union (print Label = 'すべて')
| union (print Label = 'ラベルなし')
| order by Label asc

content.title: リスクの経時変化（優先度別）

content.query:
let selectedLabel = '{LabelFilter}';
EasmRisk_CL
| where SnapshotDateTime_t {TimeRange}
| extend RiskKey = strcat(AssetUuid_g, "|", MetricDisplayName_s, "|", CategoryName_s)
| summarize arg_max(SnapshotDateTime_t, *) by RiskKey
| join kind=leftouter (
    EasmAsset_CL
    | summarize arg_max(SnapshotDateTime_t, *) by AssetUuid_g
    | project AssetUuid_g, Labels_s
) on AssetUuid_g
| where selectedLabel == 'すべて' 
    or (selectedLabel == 'ラベルなし' and (isempty(Labels_s) or Labels_s == '' or Labels_s == '[]'))
    or (selectedLabel != 'すべて' and selectedLabel != 'ラベルなし' and Labels_s contains selectedLabel)
| extend Status = iff(SnapshotDateTime_t >= ago(14d), "OPEN", "Resolved")
| extend AssetInfo = strcat(AssetType_s, ": ", AssetName_s)
| extend Priority = CategoryName_s
| extend RiskDetails = MetricDisplayName_s
| extend Labels = iff(isempty(Labels_s) or isnull(Labels_s) or Labels_s == '' or Labels_s == '[]', "ラベルなし", Labels_s)
| extend SnapshotDateJST = datetime_add('hour', 9, SnapshotDateTime_t)
| extend AssetLastSeenJST = datetime_add('hour', 9, AssetLastSeen_t)
| project Status, LastDetected = SnapshotDateJST, Priority, AssetInfo, RiskDetails, Labels, AssetLastSeen = AssetLastSeenJST
| sort by Priority asc, LastDetected desc
content.title: リスク詳細リスト（優先度別：全て）

content.query:
let selectedLabel = '{LabelFilter}';
let latestSnapshot = toscalar(EasmRisk_CL | where SnapshotDateTime_t {TimeRange} | summarize max(SnapshotDateTime_t));
EasmRisk_CL
| where SnapshotDateTime_t == latestSnapshot
| join kind=leftouter (
    EasmAsset_CL
    | summarize arg_max(SnapshotDateTime_t, *) by AssetUuid_g
    | project AssetUuid_g, Labels_s
) on AssetUuid_g
| where selectedLabel == 'すべて' 
    or (selectedLabel == 'ラベルなし' and (isempty(Labels_s) or Labels_s == '' or Labels_s == '[]'))
    or (selectedLabel != 'すべて' and selectedLabel != 'ラベルなし' and Labels_s contains selectedLabel)
| extend Priority = CategoryName_s
| extend AssetInfo = strcat(AssetType_s, ": ", AssetName_s)
| summarize HighPriority = countif(Priority == 'High Severity'),
            MediumPriority = countif(Priority == 'Medium Severity'),
            LowPriority = countif(Priority == 'Low Severity'),
            TotalRisks = count()
            by AssetInfo
| sort by HighPriority desc, MediumPriority desc, TotalRisks desc
| take 20
content.title: 多くのリスクが紐づいているアセット Top 20
